# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed.

Be specific about:
- Files added
- Files modified
- Structural changes

## Why

Explain the purpose of this change.

What problem does it solve?
What improvement does it introduce?

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] New playbook section
- [ ] Template addition
- [ ] Diagram addition
- [ ] Metrics definition
- [ ] Structural refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] ASCII-only markdown
- [ ] Links updated (docs/index.md or relevant section)
- [ ] No duplicate content introduced
- [ ] Diagrams render correctly (if applicable)
- [ ] Templates are usable without modification

## Notes for Reviewers

Highlight specific areas where feedback is needed.
